item.title: Will US oil companies be the big winners from the Iran war?
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)

item.title: Adidas shares slump on outlook, Mideast war casts shadow
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The German sportswear giant says the impact remains unclear after an Israeli franchise store was destroyed, as regional stores close.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: France plans G7 finance meeting on Mideast
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Finance minister Roland Lescure said next week's meeting aims to evaluate the situation and prepare possible responses if required.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: China’s consumers scout lower prices, secondhand goods as spending sputters
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
A longstanding taboo in Chinese culture against used goods is lifting rapidly amid stagnating wages, youth unemployment and a years-long property crisis.
Matched: breaking(+3), law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Ringgit rebounds against US dollar on renewed demand
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The ringgit and other currencies could be affected by the latest assessment of the Middle East war’s impact on global and domestic economies.

item.title: Goldman’s Solomon says markets may need ‘a couple of weeks’ to absorb Iran war impact
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
Solomon surprised at muted market reactionProbability US economy will run ‘a little bit hot’ this yearAI cou...
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Goldman CEO says markets may take a ‘couple of weeks’ to digest Iran war impact
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets tend to react in a muted way to geopolitical events unless they have a direct impact on economic growth.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Airline, travel industries scramble with fallout from Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Major Gulf hubs have closed, 21,300 flights have been cancelled leaving passengers stranded, while airline shares tumble and oil prices surge squeezing profits.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: Iran conflict threatens Gulf tourism, undermining years of investment
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Analysts peg a potential US$56 billion hit as the war puts the region’s image as a safe, high-end vacation destination at risk.
Matched: budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: Wall Street ends lower as Middle East conflict fans inflation fears
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are growing anxious about the war’s duration and its impact on energy markets as oil extends sharp gains.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: EU to lay out local content rules to strengthen manufacturing
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The EU plans to introduce low-carbon, 'Made in Europe' requirements for strategic sectors, though critics warn it could spark protectionism.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US blames Live Nation for ‘broken’ music ticket system
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
With a federal lawsuit, the US government is seeking to break up the concert promoter that also controls ticketing giant Ticketmaster.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US treasury chief says 15% global tariff likely implemented this week
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The Supreme Court annulled Donald Trump’s tariff policy, prompting him to enact new duties under separate legal authority.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Oil shock fear hits Asian tech stocks while European selloff pauses
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Plunges in one part of the world have spilled over into others as investors try to cover for losses elsewhere and cut down on risks.
Matched: breaking(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Maersk suspends bookings in Gulf ‘until further notice’
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The Danish shipping giant halts cargo passage through the Suez Canal and Strait of Hormuz as regional conflict escalates.

item.title: AI not hitting European jobs for now, says ECB
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
ECB research comparing 3,500 firms using AI and those that did not found no difference in job creation or job cuts.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)
